operator: a NOT BETWEEN b AND c
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Nullable(String), start_date Date, end_date Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, start_date, end_date) VALUES (1, 'test', '2023-01-01', '2023-12-31'), (2, NULL, '2023-01-01', '2023-12-31), (3, 'another value', '2023-01-01', NULL);
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE equals(value, NULL) OR (id NOT BETWEEN 1 AND 3);
SELECT id, value FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE ends_with(value, 'lue')) AS sub WHERE equals(id, 3);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE NOT (start_date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31') AND equals(value, 'test');
SELECT MAX(DAYOFMONTH(end_date)) FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING MAX(end_date) NOT BETWEEN '2023-06-01' AND '2023-06-30';
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO another_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 10.5), (2, 20.0), (3, NULL);
SELECT t.id, t.value FROM test_table t JOIN another_table a ON equals(t.value, a.value) WHERE t.id NOT BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(id) FROM test_table) AND (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table);
SELECT t.id, t.value, case WHEN t.value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE length(t.value) END AS value_length FROM test_table t WHERE value_length NOT BETWEEN 1 AND 10;
